title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 11 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 11 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 11 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 11/07/2025
Today, Dalian iron ore futures continued to hold up well, with the most-traded contract I2509 closing at 764, up 1.8% for the day, thoughthe increase narrowed significantly. As the weekend approached and steel mills remained cautious amid high prices, inquiry volumes decreased. The market transaction atmosphere was relatively ordinary.
